23.reason: [Logic error: checking uppercase range but using b<=57 (digit '9'), should be b<=90 for 'Z']

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Logic error: checking uppercase range but using b<=57 (digit '9'), should be b<=90 for 'Z']
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Logic error: This condition checks for uppercase letters (a>=65) but then requires b<=57 (which is '9'), mixing digit and uppercase ranges. It should be 'b<=90' for uppercase letters (A-Z).]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [Logic error: checking uppercase start (a>=65) but end condition b<=57 (digit range), should be b<=90 for uppercase letters]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [Logic error: condition checks uppercase start (a>=65) but digit end (b<=57), which is invalid; should be b<=90 for uppercase letters]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [Logic error: uppercase letters (A-Z) have ASCII 65-90, but condition checks b<=57 (which is '9'), so this condition will never be true for uppercase letters]
